mainEntity.name: Denied comp for warehouse injury in Idaho - next steps?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal to Commission w/ proof ASAP.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: **File appeal with Industrial Commission within 20 days; add medical evidence.** Referee hearing follows.[3][5] Key factors: attorney rep; subpoena records. 60% overturned; prepare testimony. Act immediately.[3]
